lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਹਿ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ਜੇਤੜੇ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: suneh vakhaaneh jetarre hau tin balihaarai jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who hear and chant the True Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਖੀਵਾ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਜਾ ਮਹਲੀ ਪਾਏ ਥਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa man kheevaa jaaneeai jaa mahalee paae thaau |2|
lines.english: Only one who obtains a room in the Mansion of the Lord's Presence is deemed to be truly intoxicated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਮੁਖੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਉਜਲਾ ਲਖ ਦਾਤੀ ਇਕ ਦਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: taa mukh hovai ujalaa lakh daatee ik daat |
lines.english: and your face shall become radiant. This is the gift of 100,000 gifts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਨੀਰੁ ਚੰਗਿਆਈਆ ਸਤੁ ਪਰਮਲੁ ਤਨਿ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: naau neer changiaaeea sat paramal tan vaas |
lines.english: Bathe in the waters of Goodness and apply the scented oil of Truth to your body,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਮਨਹੁ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਜੀਅ ਪਰਾਣ ॥
lines.translit: so kiau manahu visaareeai jaa ke jeea paraan |
lines.english: How can you forget the One who created your soul, and the praanaa, the breath of life?

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਤਿਸੈ ਪਹਿ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਸੂਖ ਜਿਸੈ ਹੀ ਪਾਸਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dookh tisai peh aakheeeh sookh jisai hee paas |3|
lines.english: Tell your troubles to the One who is the Source of all comfort. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰਿ ਗਲਾਂ ਸਭਿ ਕੂੜੀਆ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: hor galaan sabh koorreea tudh bhaavai paravaan |4|5|
lines.english: Everything else is false. Whatever pleases Your Will is acceptable. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਭੁ ਅਪਵਿਤ੍ਰੁ ਹੈ ਜੇਤਾ ਪੈਨਣੁ ਖਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis vin sabh apavitru hai jetaa painan khaan |
lines.english: Without Him, all that we wear and eat is impure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mehal 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਉ ਕਲਮ ਕਰਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲੇਖਾਰੀ ਗੁਰ ਪੁਛਿ ਲਿਖੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhaau kalam kar chit lekhaaree gur puchh likh beechaar |
lines.english: Make the love of the Lord your pen, and let your consciousness be the scribe. Then, seek the Guru's Instructions, and record these deliberations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਲਿ ਮੋਹੁ ਘਸਿ ਮਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਤਿ ਕਾਗਦੁ ਕਰਿ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaal mohu ghas mas kar mat kaagad kar saar |
lines.english: Burn emotional attachment, and grind it into ink. Transform your intelligence into the purest of paper.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਾਲਾਹ ਲਿਖੁ ਲਿਖੁ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰਾਵਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: likh naam saalaah likh likh ant na paaraavaar |1|
lines.english: Write the Praises of the Naam, the Name of the Lord; write over and over again that He has no end or limitation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਏਹੁ ਲੇਖਾ ਲਿਖਿ ਜਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa ehu lekhaa likh jaan |
lines.english: O Baba, write such an account,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਵਡਿਆਈਆ ਸਦ ਖੁਸੀਆ ਸਦ ਚਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jithai mileh vaddiaaeea sad khuseea sad chaau |
lines.english: There, where greatness, eternal peace and everlasting joy are bestowed,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਤਿਥੈ ਹੋਇ ਸਚਾ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jithai lekhaa mangeeai tithai hoe sachaa neesaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: that when it is asked for, it will bring the Mark of Truth. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਮੁਖਿ ਟਿਕੇ ਨਿਕਲਹਿ ਜਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tin mukh ttike nikaleh jin man sachaa naau |
lines.english: the faces of those whose minds are attuned to the True Name are anointed with the Mark of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਹੀ ਗਲੀ ਵਾਉ ਦੁਆਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: karam milai taa paaeeai naahee galee vaau duaau |2|
lines.english: If one receives God's Grace, then such honors are received, and not by mere words. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਉਪਾਏ ਮੰਗਤੇ ਇਕਨਾ ਵਡੇ ਦਰਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eik upaae mangate ikanaa vadde daravaar |
lines.english: Some are born beggars, and some hold vast courts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਇਕਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਉਠਿ ਰਖੀਅਹਿ ਨਾਵ ਸਲਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: eik aaveh ik jaeh utth rakheeeh naav salaar |
lines.english: Some come, and some arise and depart. They give themselves lofty names.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਗਇਆ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਵੇਕਾਰ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: agai geaa jaaneeai vin naavai vekaar |3|
lines.english: Going to the world hereafter, everyone shall realize that without the Name, it is all useless. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਤੇਰੈ ਡਰੁ ਅਗਲਾ ਖਪਿ ਖਪਿ ਛਿਜੈ ਦੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: bhai terai ddar agalaa khap khap chhijai deh |
lines.english: I am terrified by the Fear of You, God. Bothered and bewildered, my body is wasting away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਵ ਜਿਨਾ ਸੁਲਤਾਨ ਖਾਨ ਹੋਦੇ ਡਿਠੇ ਖੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: naav jinaa sulataan khaan hode dditthe kheh |
lines.english: Those who are known as sultans and emperors shall be reduced to dust in the end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਉਠੀ ਚਲਿਆ ਸਭਿ ਕੂੜੇ ਤੁਟੇ ਨੇਹ ॥੪॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak utthee chaliaa sabh koorre tutte neh |4|6|
lines.english: O Nanak, arising and departing, all false attachments are cut away. ||4||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਟ ਤੁਰਸੀ ਮੁਖਿ ਬੋਲਣਾ ਮਾਰਣ ਨਾਦ ਕੀਏ ॥
lines.translit: khatt turasee mukh bolanaa maaran naad kee |
lines.english: chanting with one's mouth, the spicy flavors are savored. All these spices have been made from the Sound-current of the Naad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਰਸ ਮਿਠੇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਸਾਲੋਣੇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ras mitthe maniai suniai saalone |
lines.english: Believing, all tastes are sweet. Hearing, the salty flavors are tasted;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਹੋਰੁ ਖਾਣਾ ਖੁਸੀ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa hor khaanaa khusee khuaar |
lines.english: O Baba, the pleasures of other foods are false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਤੀਹ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਭਾਉ ਏਕੁ ਜਾ ਕਉ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: chhateeh amrit bhaau ek jaa kau nadar karee |1|
lines.english: The thirty-six flavors of ambrosial nectar are in the Love of the One Lord; they are tasted only by one who is blessed by His Glance of Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਖਾਧੈ ਤਨੁ ਪੀੜੀਐ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਚਲਹਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jit khaadhai tan peerreeai man meh chaleh vikaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Eating them, the body is ruined, and wickedness and corruption enter into the mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਤਾ ਪੈਨਣੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਸੁਪੇਦੀ ਸਤੁ ਦਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: rataa painan man rataa supedee sat daan |
lines.english: My mind is imbued with the Lord's Love; it is dyed a deep crimson. Truth and charity are my white clothes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਮਰਬੰਦੁ ਸੰਤੋਖ ਕਾ ਧਨੁ ਜੋਬਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kamaraband santokh kaa dhan joban teraa naam |2|
lines.english: Contentment is my cummerbund, Your Name is my wealth and youth. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਲੀ ਸਿਆਹੀ ਕਦਾ ਕਰਣੀ ਪਹਿਰਣੁ ਪੈਰ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: neelee siaahee kadaa karanee pahiran pair dhiaan |
lines.english: Erasing the blackness of sin is my wearing of blue clothes, and meditation on the Lord's Lotus Feet is my robe of honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਪੈਧੈ ਤਨੁ ਪੀੜੀਐ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਚਲਹਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jit paidhai tan peerreeai man meh chaleh vikaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Wearing them, the body is ruined, and wickedness and corruption enter into the mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਹੋਰੁ ਪੈਨਣੁ ਖੁਸੀ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa hor painan khusee khuaar |
lines.english: O Baba, the pleasures of other clothes are false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਰਕਸ ਤੀਰ ਕਮਾਣ ਸਾਂਗ ਤੇਗਬੰਦ ਗੁਣ ਧਾਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: tarakas teer kamaan saang tegaband gun dhaat |
lines.english: The pursuit of virtue is my bow and arrow, my quiver, sword and scabbard.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੋੜੇ ਪਾਖਰ ਸੁਇਨੇ ਸਾਖਤਿ ਬੂਝਣੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਵਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: ghorre paakhar sueine saakhat boojhan teree vaatt |
lines.english: The understanding of Your Way, Lord, is horses, saddles and bags of gold for me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਜਾ ਨੇਜਾ ਪਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਕਰਮੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਮੇਰੀ ਜਾਤਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: vaajaa nejaa pat siau paragatt karam teraa meree jaat |3|
lines.english: To be distinguished with honor is my drum and banner. Your Mercy is my social status. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਹੋਰੁ ਚੜਣਾ ਖੁਸੀ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa hor charranaa khusee khuaar |
lines.english: O Baba, the pleasures of other rides are false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਚੜਿਐ ਤਨੁ ਪੀੜੀਐ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਚਲਹਿ ਵਿਕਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jit charriai tan peerreeai man meh chaleh vikaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: By such rides, the body is ruined, and wickedness and corruption enter into the mind. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਮੰਦਰ ਖੁਸੀ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਤੇਰੀ ਪਰਵਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: ghar mandar khusee naam kee nadar teree paravaar |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the pleasure of houses and mansions. Your Glance of Grace is my family, Lord.
